title: glaucium elbursium subsp. elbursium
intro: Glaucium elbursium subsp. elbursium, also known as Elburz poppy or Elburz glaucium, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family, Papaveraceae. It is native to Iran and is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues such as pain, fever, and digestive problems, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Glaucium elbursium subsp. elbursium include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
